title: Fix labs nav bar layout issues

log.context: Fix labs nav bar layout issues

Done. Here's a summary of what was done:

**Root cause:** `sitenav.css` styles `.sitenav` with `position: sticky`, which is constrained by the parent element's width. The labs index page body had `max-width: 720px; margin: 0 auto`, so the sticky nav was only 720px wide and centered — not full-width. Individual lab pages with their own body `max-width` had the same problem.

**Fix applied** in `/mnt/data/labs-router/src/index.ts`:

The `NAV_INJECT` constant now includes an inline `<style>` block ...(truncated)
